understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on the grid while avoiding spike tiles, using up to 2 attempts per level with 50 turns each.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_* actions shift the player position on the grid (often falling/teleporting due to current gravity direction like DOWN). CLICK removes specific tiles. Spikes end the run on landing. Gravity can change and affects movement/falling. Undo not observed in turns.
